text.title: Paid Ads Creative Library Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Paid Ads Creative Library output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: ai-generated creatives launched without human review

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: tagging_taxonomy populated with a typed value
version_policy populated with a typed value
performance_row populated with a typed value
ai_iteration_policy populated with a typed value
pruning_cadence populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
